datasets.name: ds_portfolio_counters
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_products, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN is_complete THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) as complete_pct, ROUND(AVG(repairability_score), 1) as avg_repairability FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_passport_complete

datasets.name: ds_passport_status
queryLines: SELECT passport_status, COUNT(*) as count FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_passport_complete GROUP BY passport_status ORDER BY count DESC

datasets.name: ds_products_by_category
queryLines: SELECT product_category, COUNT(*) as product_count FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_passport_complete GROUP BY product_category ORDER BY product_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_compliance_summary
queryLines: SELECT 'Compliant' as status, SUM(compliant_count) as record_count FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_passport_complete UNION ALL SELECT 'Pending' as status, SUM(pending_count) as record_count FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_passport_complete UNION ALL SELECT 'Non-Compliant' as status, SUM(non_compliant_count) as record_count FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_passport_complete

datasets.name: ds_risk_counters
queryLines: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN risk_category IN ('CRITICAL','HIGH') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as products_at_risk, SUM(expired_certificate_count) as expiring_certificates, SUM(CASE WHEN non_compliant_count > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as non_compliant_products FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_compliance_gap_analysis

datasets.name: ds_risk_distribution
queryLines: SELECT risk_category, COUNT(*) as count FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_compliance_gap_analysis GROUP BY risk_category ORDER BY count DESC

datasets.name: ds_top_risk_products
queryLines: SELECT product_name, product_category, risk_score, risk_category, non_compliant_count, pending_count, expired_certificate_count FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_compliance_gap_analysis ORDER BY risk_score DESC LIMIT 10

datasets.name: ds_risk_by_category
queryLines: SELECT product_category, risk_category, COUNT(*) as product_count FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_compliance_gap_analysis GROUP BY product_category, risk_category ORDER BY product_category, risk_category

datasets.name: ds_env_counters
queryLines: SELECT ROUND(SUM(total_carbon_kg), 0) as total_portfolio_carbon, ROUND(SUM(total_energy_kwh) / SUM(product_count), 1) as avg_energy_per_product, ROUND(SUM(total_water_liters), 0) as total_water_usage FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_carbon_by_category

datasets.name: ds_avg_carbon_by_category
queryLines: SELECT product_category, ROUND(avg_carbon_kg, 1) as avg_carbon_kg FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_carbon_by_category ORDER BY avg_carbon_kg DESC

datasets.name: ds_lifecycle_breakdown
queryLines: SELECT product_category, ROUND(100.0 * total_carbon_manufacturing / (total_carbon_manufacturing + total_carbon_transport + total_carbon_use_phase + total_carbon_end_of_life), 1) as manufacturing_pct, ROUND(100.0 * total_carbon_transport / (total_carbon_manufacturing + total_carbon_transport + total_carbon_use_phase + total_carbon_end_of_life), 1) as transport_pct, ROUND(100.0 * total_carbon_use_phase / (total_carbon_manufacturing + total_carbon_transport + total_carbon_use_phase + total_carbon_end_of_life), 1) as use_phase_pct, ROUND(100.0 * total_carbon_end_of_life / (total_carbon_manufacturing + total_carbon_transport + total_carbon_use_phase + total_carbon_end_of_life), 1) as end_of_life_pct FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_carbon_by_category ORDER BY product_category

datasets.name: ds_top_carbon_products
queryLines: SELECT product_name, product_category, ROUND(carbon_footprint_kg, 1) as carbon_footprint_kg, ROUND(energy_consumption_kwh, 1) as energy_kwh, ROUND(water_usage_liters, 1) as water_liters, ROUND(manufacturing_pct, 1) as manufacturing_pct, ROUND(renewable_content_pct, 1) as renewable_pct, ROUND(recycled_material_pct, 1) as recycled_pct FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_carbon_by_product ORDER BY carbon_footprint_kg DESC LIMIT 10

datasets.name: ds_supply_counters
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT supplier_name) as total_suppliers, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN risk_level = 'HIGH' THEN supplier_name END) as high_risk_suppliers, SUM(CASE WHEN certification_expiring_soon THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as expiring_certifications FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_supply_chain_lineage

datasets.name: ds_suppliers_by_tier
queryLines: SELECT CONCAT('Tier ', supply_chain_tier) as tier, COUNT(DISTINCT supplier_name) as supplier_count FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_supply_chain_lineage GROUP BY supply_chain_tier ORDER BY supply_chain_tier

datasets.name: ds_supplier_risk_dist
queryLines: SELECT risk_level, COUNT(DISTINCT supplier_name) as supplier_count FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_supply_chain_lineage GROUP BY risk_level ORDER BY supplier_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_high_risk_suppliers
queryLines: SELECT supplier_name, supplier_country, supplier_risk_score, product_name, certification, certification_expiry FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_supply_chain_lineage WHERE risk_level = 'HIGH' ORDER BY supplier_risk_score DESC LIMIT 15

datasets.name: ds_usage_counters
queryLines: SELECT count(*) AS total_visits, count(DISTINCT user_email) AS unique_users FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_app_usage

datasets.name: ds_usage_by_user
queryLines: SELECT coalesce(user_email,'(unknown)') AS user_email, count(*) AS visits, count(DISTINCT path) AS pages, max(accessed_at) AS last_seen FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_app_usage GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY visits DESC

datasets.name: ds_usage_recent
queryLines: SELECT accessed_at, coalesce(user_email,'(unknown)') AS user_email, app_name, method, path FROM dpp_dev.dpp.gold_app_usage ORDER BY accessed_at DESC LIMIT 100

lines: Digital Product Passport portfolio overview across all product categories
Risk assessment and compliance gap analysis across the product portfolio
Carbon footprint, energy consumption, and water usage across the product portfolio
Supplier risk assessment, certification tracking, and supply chain visibility

## DPP App Usage
Who opened the apps (populated when ACCESS_LOG_ENABLED=true).
